title: Assembly election 2026 live updates: Dilip Ghosh says TMC’s exit ‘inevitable’, calls for central forces at booths
description: Assembly Elections 2026 Live Updates: With just two days to go for polls in Tamil Nadu and West Bengal, the battle has intensified. Mamata Banerjee slammed PM Modi over his ‘jhalmuri break’, calling it a 'drama', while Piyush Goyal termed the DMK and Congress “family-run private limited companies.”
